resources.string: Kub %1$s tau poob rau koj qhov txwv ntawm %2$s
CEEB TOOM: Ua kom cov kev xaiv saum toj no yuav tso koj cov roj teeb sai dua li ib txwm
Kev cai URL tsis yog teeb tsa, lossis yog seem. Koj tuaj yeem mus rau hauv cov chaw teeb tsa los ntxiv qhov kev cai URL
%1$s URL tsis muaj, thov xyuas koj cov ntaub ntawv %2$s thiab sim dua
Rho tawm txhua cov ntaub ntawv thiab kaw
Ua tsis tiav cov ntaub ntawv %1$s nrog %2$s cov ntaub ntawv
Ua tsis tiav cov ntaub ntawv qhia txog cov ntaub ntawv
Ua tsis tiav cov ntaub ntawv %1$s
Ua tsis tiav cov ntaub ntawv huab cua los ntawm koj lub server, tshwj xeeb yog %1$s cov ntaub ntawv
Nkag mus rau qhov URL rau %1$s
Huab cua ncua sij hawm (yog tias tsim nyog)
Huab cua hom ’%1$s’ tsis raug, xyuas koj cov ntaub ntawv chaw thiab sim dua
Kev kwv yees URL tsis tau teeb tsa, teeb tsa hauv %1$s
Kuv mam kho nws thiab sim dua
Qhia sab hauv phau ntawv nyeem?
Cov app no ​​tau hloov kho tab sis tus neeg rau zaub mov koj tau txuas rau tsis tau hloov kho Inigo plugin rau WEWX. Cov teb yuav tsis pom zoo kom txog thaum Weeewx tau hloov kho
Hloov kho ntu tsis raug, hloov chaw thiab tom qab ntawd rov ua dua

Tam sim no %1$s xav tau %2$s cov ntaub ntawv los ntawm %3$s server, koj yuav tsum hloov kho %4$s thiab hloov kho %5$s cov ntaub ntawv ua ntej app no ​​yuav ua haujlwm kom raug. Nyem OK kom paub meej ntxiv ntawm %6$s
Lub hli dhau los txheeb cais
Kev tuav hloov tshiab teeb tsa, los so tshiab tshiab refresch screen kom thauj khoom
Kub %1$s tau nce mus rau koj qhov txwv ntawm %2$s
Tsis muaj download lossis app tsis tau teeb tsa
Cov ntawv ceeb toom yuav tsum tau ceeb toom rau koj thaum kub, dej nag lossis dej nag ua tau raws li koj qhov kev txwv
Txij li thaum koj tsis kam lees txais kev tso cai ob zaug, koj yuav tsum tau qhib nws hauv kev teeb tsa, tso tawm qhov chaw?
Thov tos thaum peb txheeb xyuas qhov URL uas koj xa mus

plurals.name: processing_errors2
plurals.item: Pom muaj %1$d yuam kev thaum hloov kho, saib %2$s cav kom paub meej
Pom muaj %1$d yuam kev thaum hloov kho, saib %2$s cav kom paub meej
Pom muaj %1$d yuam kev thaum hloov kho, saib %2$s cav kom paub meej
Pom muaj %1$d yuam kev thaum hloov kho, saib %2$s cav kom paub meej
Pom muaj %1$d yuam kev thaum hloov kho, saib %2$s cav kom paub meej
Pom muaj %1$d yuam kev thaum hloov kho, saib %2$s cav kom paub meej

plurals.name: processing_errors
plurals.item: Muaj %1$d yuam kev hauv %2$s cov ntaub ntawv, saib cov ntaub ntawv %2$s pom ntawm %3$s lossis saib %4$s cov ntaub ntawv kom paub meej
Muaj %1$d yuam kev hauv %2$s cov ntaub ntawv, saib cov ntaub ntawv %2$s pom ntawm %3$s lossis saib %4$s cov ntaub ntawv kom paub meej
Muaj %1$d qhov yuam kev kuaj pom hauv %2$s cov ntaub ntawv, saib %2$s cov ntaub ntawv pom ntawm %3$s lossis saib %4$s cov ntaub ntawv kom paub meej
Muaj %1$d yuam kev hauv %2$s cov ntaub ntawv, saib cov ntaub ntawv %2$s pom ntawm %3$s lossis saib %4$s cov ntaub ntawv kom paub meej
Muaj %1$d yuam kev hauv %2$s cov ntaub ntawv, saib cov ntaub ntawv %2$s pom ntawm %3$s lossis saib %4$s cov ntaub ntawv kom paub meej
Muaj %1$d yuam kev hauv %2$s cov ntaub ntawv, saib cov ntaub ntawv %2$s pom ntawm %3$s lossis saib %4$s cov ntaub ntawv kom paub meej

resources.string: Ua tsis tiav download lub radar duab
Cov duab radar tseem rub tawm
Radar Hom ’%1$s’ tsis raug, xyuas koj cov ntaub ntawv chaw thiab sim dua
Radar url tsis teeb tsa. Koj tuaj yeem mus rau cov chaw pauv
Kev ceeb toom txhua hnub thaum dej nag nce mus txog koj qhov kev txwv
Rainfall %1$s tau phim rau koj qhov txwv ntawm %2$s
Kev ceeb toom los nag loj heev?
Kev ceeb toom yog tias cov nag ntau tshaj qhov txwv hnyav raws li lub sijhawm los nag
Rainrate ntawm %1$s nyob rau hauv lub xeem %2$d %3$s tau ntaus ’Severe’ theem
Kev ceeb toom hnyav los nag
Kev ceeb toom yog tias cov nag ntau tshaj qhov ceeb toom txwv raws li lub sijhawm los nag
Rainrate ntawm %1$s nyob rau hauv lub xeem %2$d %3$s tau ntaus ’Ceeb toom’ theem
Kev ceeb toom yog tias nag nag tshaj qhov txwv saib raws li lub sijhawm los nag
Rainrate ntawm %1$s nyob rau hauv lub xeem %2$d %3$s tau ntaus ’Saib’ theem
Koj puas paub tseeb tias koj xav tshem tag nrho cov ntaub ntawv?
Rov qab mus rau kev teeb tsa
Tseem rub tawm cov ntaub ntawv kwv yees
Tseem rub tawm cov ntaub ntawv huab cua
Kev ceeb toom txog ob zaug ib hnub twg thaum qhov kub nce mus txog koj qhov kev txwv
Lub hlis no cov txheeb cais
Niaj hnub no cov txheeb cais
Tsis paub ua yuam kev tshwm sim
Tsuas yog hloov kho dua WiFi?
Teem rau phau ntawv hloov tshiab, tab sis tsis muaj cov ntsiab lus cached tsis tau
URL tau teeb tsa rau lub neej ntawd lossis tsis muaj khoob
Tsis muaj peev xwm txuas lossis rub tawm los ntawm kev cai URL teev
Tsis tau txuas lossis rub tawm kev twv
Tsis muaj peev xwm txuas lossis rub tawm %1$s los ntawm %2$s
Tsis tuaj yeem txuas lossis rub tawm los ntawm %1$s
Tsis muaj peev xwm txuas lossis rub tawm radar = duab los ntawm is taws nem
Tsis muaj peev xwm txuas lossis rub tawm cov chaw ntawm koj lub server
Tsis muaj peev xwm txuas lossis rub tawm lub webcam duab los ntawm koj lub server
Webcam URL tsis yog teeb lossis yog seem
Yuav tau hloov kho tab sis WIFI kev sib txuas tsis muaj
